main_reasons: High livelihood pressure near farming communities
Cropland-tree mosaic is appropriate for farmer-managed natural regeneration
Slope and erosion risk make soil and water resilience important
Forest-loss signal indicates a restoration opportunity
risk_flags: Field validation is required before project investment
field_validation_questions: Who currently uses this land and under what tenure arrangement?
Is grazing pressure seasonal or year-round?
Which tree species are locally preferred for fodder, fruit, fuelwood, or soil restoration?
